title: Stop Chasing Order Blocks on CPI Day - Here's What Smart Money Actually Does
description: CPI release is Monday - most traders will hunt order blocks and lose. Here's what institutional traders actually look for during high-impact news events like inflation data.
script: Order blocks work on CPI day. Just draw rectangles everywhere. Easy money, right? Wrong. CPI volatility destroys order blocks. Price gaps through them instantly. Smart money targets liquidity pools. Above highs. Below lows. That's the real play. Monday's CPI will sweep stops. Not respect your rectangles. Follow R2F Trading for more.
copyText:
Stop Chasing Order Blocks on CPI Day - Here's What Smart Money Actually Does

CPI release is Monday - most traders will hunt order blocks and lose. Here's what institutional traders actually look for during high-impact news events like inflation data.
